SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, ALESHEA E. $1,132.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,172.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
